## Regression Checklist (Required)
- [ ] User journey tested end-to-end (UI -> backend -> DB -> UI)
- [ ] Session/auth readiness handled
- [ ] Error fallback visible to user
- [ ] `npm run build` passed
- [ ] `npm test` passed
- [ ] `docs/RELEASE_LOG.md` updated
- [ ] If SQL changed: apply/audit/rollback artifacts updated
